comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for all balance numbers. Fable must never hardcode economy values in engine code. All values provisional until the simulation assertion suite passes.

time.comment: 1 real second = 2 game minutes. One game day = 12 real minutes. One game week = 84 real minutes.

revenue.comment: Profit per served customer = ticket * margin * (1 - wagesSkim) = $7.92 at start

fryer.effect: +$3 avg ticket per fryer tier, max 4 tiers

deliveryWindow.effect: unlocks platform demand stream, +40% demand, -25% margin on that stream

milestoneBonuses.comment: AdCap-style ownership milestones per station type

venues.comment: Venue N cost grows steeply — venues are the tier generators
venues.newVenueStartsWith: 1 grill, 1 register, rep 0, inherits 10% of empire rep

venueManager.effect: automates station purchasing + keeps venue earning offline

areaManager.effect: automates a region: venue managers auto-hired, specials auto-chosen at 70% efficacy

empireOperator.effect: automates a country: full economic autopilot incl. war logistics resupply

offline.model: capacity cap (Egg Inc silo model). No losses ever. Earnings accrue at 100% rate until cap hit, then stop.
offline.comment: 96 game hours = 48 real minutes of accrual, generous for a check-in cadence of 2-3x/day

reputation.sources: successful specials, review events, peak-hour service quality

weeklySpecial.comment: player picks 1 of 3 generated specials each game-week; hidden demand affinity per tile demographic

influence.comment: Continuous accrual, NO reset required. Sqrt takes the log-like bite out of exponential growth per the Angels/Soul Eggs pattern.
spentOn: permanent global multipliers (+10% empire profit per tier, cost growth 1.5x)

war.comment: One-directional conquest. Attacks can FAIL (resources lost) but owned territory can NEVER be lost.
war.tileCaptureCost: tile.defenseRating * regionCostScalar, paid in cash + influence
war.battleResolution: deterministic score = (localCapacity + marketing + supplyLine) vs tile.defense, with visible pre-battle win estimate. No RNG below 100% shown as risk of wasted resources, not lost ground.

pacingTargets.comment: Assertion suite for the IDLE economy (gmin clock). Active-layer feel targets are NOT sim-verifiable — they gate on Ben's playtest sign-off (see CLAUDE.md feel gates).
pacingTargets.noSingleStationDominates: no station type should account for >65% of profit growth at any point after minute 30
pacingTargets.offlineCapNeverExceeds: 50% of expected daily active earnings at equivalent progression

venueSizes.comment: Physical station caps per venue size. Renovations raise ALL caps and visibly widen the venue. Every upgrade maxes out; bigger venues max higher. Verified v2 pacing: manager 21.9min, venue2 59.1min.

activeLayer.comment: THE EXPEDITOR — real-time active play layer, validated through prototypes v1-v7 (see PROTOTYPE_NOTES.md). Feel values are provisional pending Ben's playtest sign-off at every milestone. Two-clock model: gmin economy clock drives idle sim + daypart intensity; active layer runs in real seconds.
activeLayer.designPrinciple: Every attention state needs a verb: rush = triage + restock boosts; lull = prep, flyers, research; always = coins. Active levers amplify skill, never print money.
activeLayer.orderMix: balanced: ~50% of orders contain a burger, 25% chips-led, 20% drink-only, 25% full combo; tradie crew (rare): 3-5 burgers, short fuse, price tag shown

serving.insufficientStock: customer shakes, missing items flash — no penalty

stations.model: self-produce into stock buffers; tap pad adds 0.34 progress; staff multiply auto rate x3; buffers capped by venue size + upgrades

hires.order: cheapest lane first — three separate relief moments

wavePacing.model: decoupled from economy clock; human-scale bursts

socialAds.designNote: break-even only if the wave is served well — skill-gated marketing

openQuestions: verb count: cut any verb Ben ignores in playtests
active vs idle yield ratio target ~2-3x at equal progression — needs sim work
tip window and patience values are pure feel — playtest gated
